title: allium sahandicum
intro: Allium sahandicum, also known as Sa'ltan onion, is a species of wild onion native to Iran. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant is known to have antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting against cell damage. Allium sahandicum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile natural remedy for maintaining overall health and well-being.
